title: Dr. Jairaj's Hospital
text:
Dr. Jairaj's Hospital +91 70450 11188 Dr Jairajs Hospital , 2nd Floor, Om Chanakya Complex, Sector 6, CBD Belapur, Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra 400614 Home (current) About Us Services Orthopaedic General Medicine Gynecology Laparoscopic Maternity Critical Care Gallery Contact Us Previous Next Healing Welcome to Dr. Jairaj's Hospital Welcome to Dr. Jairaj's Hospital, a leading multispeciality healthcare institution located in Belapur, Navi Mumbai. At our hospital, we are dedicated to providing exceptional medical care and personalized attention to our patients, ensuring their well-being and recovery. With a team of highly skilled and experienced doctors, surgeons, and medical staff, we offer a comprehensive range of medical services across various specialties. Our state-of-the-art facilities, advanced diagnostic tools, and cutting-edge technologies enable us to deliver accurate diagnoses and effective treatments. Know More Specialists Our Doctors Dr. Dhruv Patel MBBS, D. Ortho, D.N.B (Orthopaedic Surgery),
              M.S (Orthopaedic Surgery) View Profile Dr. Jatin Talele MBBS, MD (General Medicine) Diabetologist & General Physician View Profile Dr. Alpana Gupta Khare Obstetrician & Gynecologist View Profile Treatments Our Services Orthopaedic Treatments Know More General Medicine Know More Gynecology Specialist Know More Laparoscopic Surgery Know More Maternity Speciality Know More Critical Care Know More Join Us Book A Treatment Or Walk In! Every facet of daily life is aligned with the purpose of nurturing, health, harmony, and spiritual growth and provides a complete experiential education in holistic living. Call Now Testimonials Our Patient's Says Dr. Alpana Gupta Khare is one of the best gynaecologist’s you can find nearby. It was my first pregnancy and I had a smooth normal delivery under her guidance. She is supportive, caring as well as have a top excellency in her work.I would highly recommend her for happy and safe pregnancy..! Kavita Kshirsagar Dr Alpana Gupta Khare, Obstetrician & Gynaecologist is the best Gynaecologist doctor of Navi Mumbai. She is non-judgmental and treats patients with proper care. She never suggested unnecessary tests, etc. Highly recommended. Sunshine Education I got treated for DVT by Dr Jatin sir , I got satisfied results. Happy with treatment. Tejveer Singh Itan Dr.Alpana Gupta Khare is best obstetrician and gynecologist in CBD Belapur, Navi Mumbai.We consulted her for PCOD treatment, she explained everything about medical issues and have positive attitude towards the patient, my wife conceived immediately after one month of her treatment so we are very grateful to you Alpana madam💑🤰 … JiSan Alam Staff was cooperative and concern. Always there when needed . Doctors visit was regular. Good experienced.
